title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 11 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 11/03/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures opened lower but closed higher, with the most-traded I2505 contract finally settling at 774.5 yuan/mt, down0.06% for the day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for selling; steel mills purchased as needed, with limited inquiries; and the market transaction atmosphere remained sluggish. In Shandong, the mainstream transaction prices for PB fines were around 775 yuan/mt, basically stable compared to yesterday's prices.
